horses.name: Calcary Akarad TH
horses.pedigree_raw: Akarado Hero Z x Opium JW van de Moerhoeve
horses.catalog_text: Calcary Akarad TH carries a promising name, fitting given his pedigree. Sire Akarad Hero Z was a powerhouse competing successfully at CSI5* 160cm with Pieter Clemens, and has already produced impressive showjumpers in breeding. Dam Ulite van de Bisschop is a daughter of Opium JW van de Moerhoeve, a successful Kannan stallion ridden by Lillie Keenan. Granddam Elite de la Pomme is a direct daughter of top mare Narcotique de Muze II and half-sister to many 160cm Grand Prix horses including Querlybet Hero, Farfelu de la Pomme, Giovani de la Pomme, and others. This damline of Querly Chin is one of the most successful worldwide.

horses.name: Olivia
horses.catalog_text: This charming six-year-old mare Olivia has started her international showjumping career with success. She has stood out in CSI Ermelo and CSI Kessel for her consistent performance, light-footed movement, and exceptional jumping ability. As a daughter of It’s Otto, Olivia is an eye-catcher thanks to her beautiful looks and talent. She is a horse full of potential and highly intelligent in the showjumping arena.

horses.name: Farbenfroh HE Z
horses.catalog_text:
The scope and quality of For Pleasure never go out of style, making Farbenfroh HE Z an exciting future prospect. His dam, Calizinthe, already produced the well-known stallion Coco Bongo, who has competed successfully up to 160cm international level with Eric Lamaze and Nina Mallevaey. Under the Polish flag, the stallion Rotmistrz also competed up to 160cm-level and is a half-brother to Farbenfroh’s dam Calizinthe. This well-respected Holsteiner line has also produced legendary stallions like Calypso I, Calypso II, and Calypso III.

Breeder: M.T.J. Hekerman

horses.name: Oriento
horses.catalog_text: The six-year-old Oriento has already successfully made his debut at 130cm and is on the brink of an international career. Through his sire Jacquet-Go, he inherits the valuable genes of Thunder van de Zuuthoeve, and on the dam side, he comes from a strong Holsteiner damline, which produced the legend Landgraf I. Oriento impresses with his great uphill canter and excellent balance. He jumps with plenty of scope and demonstrates an excellent front-leg technique. Oriento shows great potential for the future.

horses.name: Opportunity
horses.pedigree_raw: Poker de Mariposa TN x Vingino
horses.catalog_text: As the name suggests, Opportunity is a unique chance to acquire a top talent. This six-year-old son of Poker de Mariposa TN already performs successfully at international 130cm level. Earlier on this year, at the Sunshine Tour, Opportunity impressed with numerous clear rounds and was qualified for the final, in which he also delivered a clear round. This gelding stands out for his tremendous canter and athleticism on the jump. With his great attitude and big heart, he seems to have the potential to develop for the highest level.

horses.name: Voque GP
horses.catalog_text: The filly Voque GP is a daughter of the highly praised Heartbreaker son Echo van ’t Spieveld. Ridden by Niels Bruynseels, Echo competed at Grand Prix level, and in breeding, he has already produced successful talents such as Kheros van ’t Hoogeinde, Jivaro Imperio Egipcio and Kaprice. Voque GP’s dam is the Kannan daughter Icelien W, herself a daughter of the famous 160cm Grand Prix mare Elien of Katharina Offel. In combination with Grandorado TN, Icelien W has already produced the promising Melien, who, ridden by Bryan Smits, achieves successes at 145cm level at the age of just eight years old. Going further back in Voque GP’s pedigree, she is related to the 160cm showjumping horses Paulien and Ulien, as well as to the renowned Ucelien of Willem Greve and Athina Onassis.

horses.name: Nochi Leste TS
horses.pedigree_raw: I’m Special de Muze x Berlin
horses.catalog_text: Nochi Leste TS is a seven-year-old mare with extensive competition experience at 140cm level. She is known for her high percentage of clear rounds and recently placed third in the CSI1* Grand Prix of Ermelo. She stands out with her carefulness and good technique. Nochi Leste TS shows great potential to be competitive at ranking class level next year. Her sire, I’m Special de Muze, is an influential son of Emerald, and Nochi Leste TS carries the valuable genes from Berlin and top sire Lux Z.

horses.name: Vamos van de Stapel
horses.catalog_text: Vamos van de Stapel is an impressive colt by the promising sire Chacfly PS, son of top stallion Chacco Blue. His dam’s sire, Grandorado TN, is undoubtedly one of the best showjumpers worldwide, helping Willem Greve achieve a top 10 placing in the FEI World Cup Final in Basel this year. Granddam G-Star van de Riethandel is a daughter of Olympic medalist Cardento and half-sister to three international jumpers. Additionally, Vamos van de Stapel is closely related to Great Britain V, the highly successful 160cm showjumper ridden by Jérôme Guery.

horses.name: Boomerang Optimus Z
horses.catalog_text:
Boomerang Optimus Z is a highly complete five-year-old talent by Bamako de Muze. This impressive gelding stands out for his enormous scope, good balance, and plenty of blood. His sire Bamako de Muze is one of the top breeding sires of modern showjumping, siring notable offspring such as the famous Portobella van de Fruitkorf, who won the five-star Grand Prix in Wellington with Emilie Conter. He also sired Olympic medalist Don Juan van de Donkhoeve (Jessica Springsteen), successful stallion Kasanova de la Pomme (Koen Vereecke), and well-known Iashin Sitte (Steve Guerdat).

horses.name: Viva Termie van de Crumelhaeve
horses.pedigree_raw: Agana van het Gerendal Z x Conthargos
horses.catalog_text: Sire Agana van het Gerendal Z is a real dream horse ridden by Lillie Keenan. This Aganix du Seigneur son has already secured numerous international victories and is of significant value for breeding. Viva Termie van de Crumelhaeve is a filly by Agana van het Gerendal Z out of the Conthargos mare Sunny Termie van de Crumelhaeve. Her granddam, B. Termie R, is a daughter of Grand Prix stallion Rubert R and dam of the 160cm Grand Prix stallion Emir R who jumped at 1.60 level with Rolf Göran Bengtson. Half-sister of the mother of Viva Termie, F.Termie R12 jumped upto 150 with Sofia Westborg and the full brother of the granddam of Viva Termie, Ascend jumped upto 150 level with Hendrik Jan and Frank Schuttert. The well-known Termie damline has produced many top-level jumpers, including Jill Henselwood’s Toyz R Us, Tolan R, and SM Moses.

horses.name: Chaccerno van ‘t Reevediep
horses.pedigree_raw: Chacco Blue x Aganix du Seigneur
horses.catalog_text:
In 2002, Irish rider Dermott Lennon astonished by becoming World Champion in Jerez de la Frontera riding the legendary mare Liscalgot. This colt, Chaccerno van ’t Reevediep, is a great-grandson of the world-famous Liscalgot, who also contributed to Ireland’s team gold at the 2001 European Championships in Arnhem. Liscalgot has been foundational in breeding many top international jumpers, including the 160cm jumping mare Calgot Pleasure — the direct granddam of this colt. Calgot Pleasure has produced multiple international jumpers as well, and with Chacco Blue as sire and Aganix du Seigneur as grandsire, Chaccerno van ’t Reevediep’s pedigree is solid as a house.

Breeder: R. van der Sluis – Koestier

horses.name: Odessa K
horses.catalog_text: The six-year-old mare Odessa K is a particularly charming mare that stands out for her talent and technique. This daughter of It’s Otto shows enormous potential and consistently thinks along with her rider. Although still relatively green in competition experience, she impresses with her great attitude and has already competed successfully in 120cm classes. Her sire It’s Otto is a son of Etoulon VDL, and on the dam side, Odessa K carries the genes from Dantos HBC and Namelus R.

horses.name: Vanadia W
horses.pedigree_raw: Tobago Z x Zirocco Blue VDL
horses.catalog_text:
Vanadia W is a filly combining the elite Grand Prix stallions Tobago Z and Zirocco Blue VDL. Ridden by Daniel Deusser, Tobago Z won numerous five-star Grand Prix competitions, including the Rolex Grand Slam Grand Prix in ’s-Hertogenbosch. Zirocco Blue VDL was similarly successful with Jur Vrieling and has produced top progeny such as Elysium, Eddie Blue, Glamour Girl and Zuccero HV. Vanadia W’s damline traces back to Jalisco B daughter Dixie d’Amain, dam of 150cm jumpers Quick Silver B Z, Cairo W, and Quickiedeedoo, and dam of the 160cm showjumper Royal Star ridden by Irish rider Cameron Hanley.

Breeder: Stal Wezenberg
